steps.title: Admin login
steps.note: Open the admin backoffice (:8081) — it redirects to /admin/login.

steps.title: Admin login filled
steps.note: Enter the administrator credentials and click Sign In.

steps.title: Admin dashboard
steps.note: Authenticated — the admin dashboard with KPI cards + sidebar.

steps.title: Create user filled
steps.note: Fill every field: email, password, first/last name, status, role, billing address, phone.

steps.title: Edit user — access levels
steps.note: Open "Edit User". The Account tab has a "User Access Levels" section with Basic / Pro.

steps.title: Grant Basic permission
steps.note: Tick the "Basic" access level to grant the user Basic permissions.

steps.title: Basic granted saved
steps.note: Save Changes — the Basic access level is now granted to the user.
